titleStmt.title: SII 8.436: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 436. (A.R. No. 148 of 1903). ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastajagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpuramādhava keraḷavamśanirmūlana laṅkādvipaluṇṭhanadvitīyarāma coḷakulaśailakuliśa karṇāṭarājavidrāvaṇa kāṭhakakarikūṭapākala vividharipudurggamartdana vīragaṇḍagopālavipinadāvada hana kāñcīpuravarādhīśvara gaṇapati hariṇaśārdūla nellūrapuraviracitavirābhiṣeka praṇatarājādhirāja parameśvara tribhu vaṉaccakra vatti śrīsundarapāṇḍyade var tirumalaināṭṭu tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉa The record is built in the middle.cuntarapāṇṭi yakaṟkum Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi Uḷḷuṭṭu
veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavukkum koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātu Ilaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu teṉkonāṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟūr ṉāṉkellaik kuṭppaṭṭa nirnilamum nañcey puṉceyum nattamum nattappāḻum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum Uṭppaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉamum paḷḷiccantamum brāhmaṇa Iṟaiyiliyum nikki Uḷḷa nilattukku Iṟukkum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum taruvatāṉaaccum kāriyavārāṭcciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupiliyu ṭṭamum Iṭaiyvariyum Iṉavariyum poṉvariyum Uṭpaṭa maṟ
ṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Aṇṇāḻvikkup patiṉāṟāvatumutal tavirttu tevartāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākat tantu Iṉṉāṭṭil puravilum variyilum kaḻippatāka coṉṉom . Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu candrāditya vaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Ivvūr ṉāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlasthā panam paṇṇik kaiykoṇ ṭaṉupavikka . Ippaṭikku muttūṟṟukūṟṟaṉāṭṭu Antaṉūrā �ka mpūruṭaiyāṉ vaṇṭuvarāpati viṟṟiruṉtaperuThe inscription is built in below.
Digital edition of SII 8.436 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
